channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI and the Pope
item.description: The church’s document on AI recognizes technology as a wonderful aspect of humanity, but cautions that 'technology is never neutral.'

item.title: Trump administration proposes expanding hunting rights on public lands
item.description: The proposed rule follows an Interior Department order stating that public lands should be open for hunting.

item.title: KBJ suggests judges might defy emergency SCOTUS orders
item.description: Jackson's remarks are considered extreme given that lower courts are traditionally bound by Supreme Court rulings.

item.title: Bank regulators step back from 'reputational risk' oversight
item.description: Serving businesses that bureaucrats dislike should never have been considered a financial risk.
